[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010100110 4
1 111110010 6
2 111000111 6
3 001111111 7
4 111111111 a
5 111111101 8
6 111000110 5
7 101111111 8

01 10 110101111 7
12 21 000111111 6
23 32 001111111 7 match 3
34 43 111111101 8 match 5
45 54 111101100 6
56 65 101111101 7
67 76 000111101 5
70 07 110111001 6

02 20 110111111 8
13 31 001111111 7 match 3
24 42 111111111 a match 4
35 53 101111101 7

71 17 000111111 6

61 16 000111111 6
